founder.name: Aria Voss
founder.bio: Infrastructure engineer. Ex-DeepMind inference team. Second-time founder; first company Vecta acquired by GitLab in 2021.

company.name: Vecta
company.one_liner: Local-first CI cache that cut build times for monorepos. Acquired by GitLab (2021).

content.title: Show HN: Vecta - a local-first build cache for monorepos
content.author: ariavoss

content.note: Vecta acquired by GitLab. Team of 6 at exit. Terms undisclosed but reported as a strong acqui-hire+product deal.
